runs.text: Typography is the craft of endowing human language with a durable visual form.

. The invisible nature of good typography ensures that the reader's attention is entirely focused on the message, not the medium. It acts as a crystal goblet, allowing the wine of the text to be appreciated without distraction.
stitch letters into fluid shapes, preventing awkward collisions between characters. From justified columns to careful kerning, every
affects the final impression on the page.

A well-designed page should invite the eye to enter the text, read without strain, and navigate easily from one section to the next. The rhythm of the words on the page must match the rhythm of the spoken thought, giving breath to the silent voice of the author.
